description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a single deploy stage and add a pages job that runs the exact command echo 'Nothing to do...'. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact and restrict it to run only on the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed. The pipeline should be ready to serve GitLab Pages from the public folder when the master branch is updated.
